# ParamEncoding.MinSafeAnnotatedInteger field

The smallest integer that may safely carry the `x-mcp-header` annotation: `−(2^53 − 1)`. (R-9.5.1-g) Equal to JavaScript's `Number.MIN_SAFE_INTEGER`.

```csharp
public const long MinSafeAnnotatedInteger;
```
